message.content: @startuml skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center participant "Database" as db <> #DBE9F6#03A8FC box "#D7DADE#1B425C ManageLogDemo\nManageLogReceiveFacade" #FFFFFF#0000FF participant "" as demo end box box "#D7DADE#1B425C \nManageLogReceiveProvider;ManageLogCommon;\nAnotherJavaProject;" #FFFFFF#0000FF participant "" as provider participant "" as common participant "" as anotherproject end box box "#D7DADE#1B425C \nManageLogUploadFacade;\nAnotherProject;" #FFFFFF#0000FF participant "" as uploadfacade participant "" as project end box box "#D7DADE#1B425C \nManageLogQueryProvider;\nManageLogQueryFacade" #FFFFFF#0000FF participant "" as queryprovider participant "" as facade end box note over demo,facade : rpc/http/kafka ,数据为业务数据，configName frame "rpc 上传日志"{ demo ->>demo: aspect 获取数据 db <- -db:落地数据 } frame "自主使用 facde 上传日志 "{ project->>uploadfacade：自己组装数据，使用 facade 提供的策略上传 db<- -db:落地数据 } frame "自主上传日志"{ anotherproject-->common:http/kafka,数据为业务数据，configName db<--db:落地数据 } note right of demo,database:#ffffff#ff0000 注意\ndemo和数据库之间没有交互 frame "日志查询"{ facade -->queryprovider:获取数据 queryprovider- > facade:rpc提供 facade <-- project:http 提供（默认） } @enduml
